How It Works

Get your medical equipment in three simple steps

01

Share Requirements

Contact us on WhatsApp or call with your product list, quantities, and delivery city.

02

Get Quote

Receive competitive pricing with GST breakdown within 24 hours during working days.

03

Fast Dispatch

Products are packed carefully and dispatched with tracking. Delivery across India.

Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions? We have answers. Contact us for more information.

How do I get a quote?

Share the product name, quantity, and your city on WhatsApp or call us during working hours. Our team will respond with pricing and availability.

What is your response time for quotes?

We typically respond within 24 hours during working hours (Monday–Saturday, 10 AM–7 PM IST). WhatsApp messages are checked regularly throughout the day.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept bank transfers (NEFT/RTGS), UPI payments, and credit/debit cards. For bulk orders, we can discuss payment terms. All payments include GST invoice.

Do you deliver across India?

Yes, we deliver to all major cities across India including Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Pune, and more. Shipping costs depend on location and order volume.

What is your warranty policy?

Warranty varies by product and brand. Most medical equipment comes with manufacturer warranty. Specific warranty details are shared with each quote.

Do you accept bulk or institutional orders?

Yes, we specialize in bulk orders for hospitals, clinics, and healthcare institutions. Contact us with your requirements for competitive bulk pricing.

Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?

For certain products, we can arrange samples or demonstrations. Contact us to discuss sample availability for specific items.

How do I track my order?

Once dispatched, we share tracking details via WhatsApp or email. You can also contact us directly for order status updates.

Ready to get started?

Contact us today for competitive quotes on medical equipment
